title: Tripura Forest Department – Forester, Forest Guard – 271 Posts
shortInfo: Tripura Forest Department Recruitment 2026: 271 Forester, Forest Guard vacancies. Apply online from 1 May to 31 May 2026 at forest.tripura.gov.in.

basic_details.job_title: Tripura Forest Department Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 271 Forester, Forest Guard Posts
basic_details.short_information: Tripura Forest Department Recruitment 2026: 271 Forester, Forest Guard vacancies. Apply online from 1 May to 31 May 2026 at forest.tripura.gov.in.

salary_details.pay_scale: Forest Guard: Level-6 (Rs. 5700-24000 + GP 2100) Forester: Level-7 (Rs. 5700-24000 + GP 2200)

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted in online mode only through the official portal. The step-by-step process is as follows:
